name: Media Toolkit
tagline: Transcode, download, and play — ffmpeg, yt-dlp, mpv
description: A complete command-line media pipeline. FFmpeg transcodes and streams virtually any format, yt-dlp downloads audio and video from thousands of sites, and mpv plays it all with scriptable precision. HandBrake adds one-command, preset-based encoding (like 'Fast 1080p30') when you don't want to hand-write ffmpeg filter graphs. Lightweight and runs on any Mac or Linux box.
caveats: Command-line tools. Lightweight; runs on any supported Mac or Linux.
